name: python3-skia-pathops
title: python3-skia-pathops
summary: Python bindings for the Skia library's Path Ops module (Python 3)
description:
Python bindings for the Skia library's Path Ops module (Python 3)
This package provides the Python bindings for the Google Skia library's Path
Ops module, performing boolean operations on paths (intersection, union,
difference, xor).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-skia-pathops because Python bindings for the Skia library's Path Ops module (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-skia-pathops as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-skia-pathops with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-skia-pathops --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
